sample_selection: detailed Hispanic origin indicates Mexican descent (hispand 100-107)
positive immigration year with valid birth records and 0 <= yrimmig - birthyr <= 15
valid usual hours (< 98) among people who worked last week (wrklstwk in {1, 2})
treatment_definition: (yrimmig <= 2007) and ((yrimmig - birthyr) <= 15) and ((birthyr > 1981) or (birthyr == 1981 and birthqtr >= 3))
